/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -flto=auto -shared  -o pressureplate.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/pressureplate.dir/src/array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pressureplate.dir/src/array_gpu.cu.o CMakeFiles/pressureplate.dir/src/bindings.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublasLt.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libculibos.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
